products.name: HeadyBuddy
products.description: AI companion platform with 7 cognitive archetypes, persistent memory, and cross-device presence. The human-facing intelligence layer of Heady™.

products.name: HeadyMe
products.description: Personal cloud hub and command center. Manage your AI agents, search 3D vector memory, and control your Heady identity from one dashboard.

products.name: HeadyAPI
products.description: Public REST and GraphQL API gateway with interactive playground, key management, φ-scaled rate limiting, and SDK libraries for JS, Python, and Go.

products.name: HeadyMCP
products.description: Model Context Protocol server registry and integration layer. 31 tools, dual JSON-RPC + SSE transport, compatible with Claude and OpenAI.

products.name: HeadyIO
products.description: Data flow I/O platform — real-time event streams, webhook management, 50+ third-party connectors, SDK gateway, and developer sandbox.

products.name: HeadyBot
products.description: Embeddable conversational AI widget with multi-platform support (Slack, Discord, Teams, Web), context memory, and no-code builder.

products.name: HeadyCloud
products.description: Managed cloud infrastructure for AI workloads. Auto-scaling, multi-region deployment, and Heady-native orchestration on Google Cloud and Cloudflare.

products.name: HeadyWeb
products.description: Modular AI-native web experience framework. Build intelligent, personalized web surfaces powered by Heady agents and vector memory.

products.name: HeadyOS
products.description: The sovereign AI operating system layer. Manages agent lifecycles, memory persistence, swarm coordination, and platform-wide resource governance.

products.name: HeadyConnection (Commercial)
products.description: B2B integration and partnership portal. Enterprise connections, white-label options, dedicated SLA support, and the Heady partner program.

products.name: HeadyConnection (Nonprofit)
products.description: Nonprofit arm focused on digital literacy, community AI access, youth coding programs, and bridging the technological divide.

products.name: HeadyFinance
products.description: AI-powered financial intelligence layer. Budget tracking, cost optimization across cloud providers, and spend forecasting for AI operations.

products.name: HeadyEx
products.description: Exchange and marketplace layer for Heady ecosystem assets, agent capabilities, and premium integrations.

products.name: HeadyMusic
products.description: AI-native music creation, discovery, and distribution platform powered by Heady's creative agent archetypes.

products.name: HeadyStore
products.description: Marketplace for Heady extensions, agent packs, persona bundles, and community-built integrations.
